targets.notes: COMPLETE. All 11 theorems proved, no sorry.

COMPLETE. All 30+ theorems proved, 0 sorry. Task 5 this run added: truncateAndAppend_snapshot, stableEntries_wellFormed, stableSnap_wellFormed, truncateAndAppend_snapCoherent (with hsnap_offset precondition), truncateAndAppend_wellFormed.
targets.note_hsnap_offset: INV-2 (snapCoherent) has entries!=[] guard; truncateAndAppend_wellFormed needs extra hsnap_offset:snapshot.isSome->snap.index<offset for entries=[] + gap case. Always holds in Raft (restore sets offset=snap.index+1). Future: consider strengthening INV-2.

targets.notes: Phase 1->3 this run. Abstract model List-based. 20+ theorems proved, 3 sorry: freeTo_all_gt, freeTo_suffix, freeTo_monotone_idempotent (need List.mem_dropWhile / List.dropWhile_nthLe Mathlib lemmas).

next_steps: Task5: Inflights - prove freeTo_all_gt (x in dropWhile p xs -> !p x), freeTo_suffix (dropWhile is suffix), freeTo_monotone_idempotent. Search Mathlib for List.not_mem_dropWhile or List.dropWhile_suffix.
Task4: Inflights - consider adding concrete model of ring buffer addressing as a separate verification target to connect abstract model to implementation.
Consider: strengthen wellFormed INV-2 (snapCoherent) to remove entries!=[] guard, simplifying truncateAndAppend_wellFormed.
